creator: patovm04@gmail.com
text:
Since upgrading to 14.0-RC3, sound on linux browsers stopped working on my Ubuntu-based chroot.

The same had happened previously when upgrading from 13.2-RELEASE-p2 to 13.2-RELEASE-p3. But upgrading to 14.0 solved it back then, until now...

Also reported here:
https://forums.freebsd.org/threads/no-sound-in-linuxulator.90285/
